description: Style NoteCrafted from the softest fabric and styled with high fashion oomph, this pair of night dress from bw!tch contours your every curve and shapes you to give you an effortlessly curvy look. Now that's something worth investing in!Product DetailsChocolate brown satin night dress with a V-neckline with embroidered lace at the neckline, bow detail in the centre and thin and adjustable shoulder straps with lace detailingMaterial and CareSatin, laceHand wash, drip dry in shadeDo not wring, iron, bleachWash dark colours separately
